reaction: Dry persistent cough, may mimic dyspnea
mechanism: ACE inhibition prevents bradykinin degradation → bradykinin accumulation in bronchial mucosa → sensitization of cough reflex via C-fibre stimulation. Onset is idiosyncratic — not PK-determinable. Resolves 1-4 weeks after discontinuation.

contextualModifiers.modifierValue: Asian ethnicity — 2-3× higher incidence than Caucasian
contextualModifiers.effect: increased cough incidence in Asian populations

sourceSnippet: StatPearls ACE Inhibitors; BMJ Best Practice
